title: WinForms Event Handler Stacking in Grid Refreshes
description: Calling Add_CellFormatting or Add_CellPainting inside functions that run repeatedly stacks duplicate handlers, causing massive performance degradation. Use script-scope guard hashtable ($script:ColoredGrids) to prevent re-registration.
notes: Regression detection: search for Add_Cell* inside loops or repeated-call functions. Guard pattern: if ($guard.ContainsKey($key)) { return }.
